first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in geospatial and full-stack development and the key weakness regarding a lack of direct C++/Rust experience for routing pipelines. The minor differences in wording and specific details mentioned (e.g., the date of last C++ work) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's name.
